assertions.title: Multi-SKU order-to-invoice continuity stays intact end-to-end

steps.observed: Orders page loaded with 'Couldn't load orders' error
Drawer opened successfully
Dealer selected, GST type indicator showed 'Intra-state (CGST + SGST)'

steps.action: Add first line item (SKU-001, qty 10, price 100)
steps.observed: Line total calculated: 1,180.00

steps.action: Add second line item (SKU-002, qty 5, price 250)
steps.observed: Second line total: 1,475.00, Grand Total: 2,655.00
Backend returned 400 error

assertions.issues: Backend returned 400 on order creation. Cannot test end-to-end continuity (order -> dispatch -> invoice) without successful order creation.

assertions.title: Sales order creation requires an active ordering-eligible dealer and at least one valid line

steps.observed: Orders page loaded
Drawer opened with dealer combobox
Dealer dropdown showed 'Fixture Dealer FIX-DEALER' and 'Mock GST Dealer GST-DEALER' - both appear to be active

steps.action: Attempt to create order without dealer
steps.observed: Create order button correctly disabled when no dealer selected

steps.action: Select dealer, add incomplete line (no price)
steps.observed: Create order button disabled with incomplete line
Create order button enabled after adding valid line item (product code, qty > 0, price > 0)
Backend returned 400 error

assertions.title: Order tax mode and totals follow dealer state and entered lines

steps.action: Create new order and select dealer
steps.observed: GST type indicator showed 'Intra-state (CGST + SGST) — Dealer state: MH'

steps.action: Add line item (SKU-001, qty 10, price 100, GST 18%)
Add second line item (SKU-002, qty 5, price 250, GST 18%)
steps.observed: Second line: 1,475.00
Subtotal: 2,250.00, CGST: 202.50, SGST: 202.50, Grand Total: 2,655.00

steps.observed: Orders list empty, 'Couldn't load orders' error shown

assertions.title: Order status, actions, and timeline stay consistent across list and detail

steps.observed: Orders list showed 'Couldn't load orders' error, 0 orders
No orders available due to backend readiness issues

assertions.title: Order cancellation captures structured reason metadata

steps.expected: Orders list with orders to cancel
steps.observed: No orders available
Component exists with reason dropdown containing: CUSTOMER_REQUEST, CREDIT_BLOCK, PRICING_ISSUE, STOCK_UNAVAILABLE, DUPLICATE_ORDER, OTHER. Also has optional notes textarea.

assertions.issues: Cannot test cancellation flow because no orders exist. CancelDialog UI component exists with proper structure (reason dropdown + notes field), but cannot verify actual cancellation request or timeline update without a cancelable order.

frictions.description: Backend readiness issues causing order list API failures - not mentioned in user-testing.md as a known issue for this session
Backend 400 error on order creation prevents testing end-to-end flows

blockers.description: Backend API not accepting order creation requests (POST /api/v1/sales/orders returns 400)
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried with different product codes and quantities - all resulted in 400 error

blockers.description: Backend readiness issues causing orders list API to fail
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried orders list load multiple times, refreshed page - consistent errors

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-O2C-005, VAL-O2C-006), 4 blocked (VAL-O2C-004, VAL-O2C-007, VAL-O2C-008, VAL-O2C-009). Frontend UI correctly validates dealer selection and line items, calculates GST totals based on dealer state, and has structured cancellation reason capture. Backend readiness issues and 400 errors on order creation blocked end-to-end flow validation.

working: Dealer combobox filters to ACTIVE dealers only
Dealer combobox excludes OVER_LIMIT (dunning held) dealers
Create order button correctly disabled until valid dealer and line items present
Line item validation requires product code, quantity > 0, and unit price > 0
GST mode correctly inferred from dealer state code (intra-state CGST+SGST vs inter-state IGST)
Order summary shows correct subtotal, GST breakdown, and grand total
CancelDialog component has structured reason dropdown with codes: CUSTOMER_REQUEST, CREDIT_BLOCK, PRICING_ISSUE, STOCK_UNAVAILABLE, DUPLICATE_ORDER, OTHER
CancelDialog has optional notes textarea for additional details

issues: GET /api/v1/sales/orders/search returns errors due to backend readiness issues
